source: docs/NAVIGATION_MODEL.json + direct Angular source analysis (broadcasting.component.ts/.html, scenarios, send-methods-list, latest-msg-box, unapproved-msg-box)

context.note: All panels operate within the authenticated user current profile. Hub re-initializes all panels on profileChanged$ event.

design_notes: Broadcasting is the primary post-login hub — not a list/detail workspace.
No hierarchy within the hub. All panels are independent and co-equal.
Bottom panels are informational — status-lists showing recent activity per state category.
Clicking a bottom-panel item navigates OUT to the status capability.
LimitedUser role variant: /broadcasting-limited — UNKNOWN how it differs.

panels.name: send-methods
panels.purpose: Present all available broadcast methods as an icon-grid. Each item is a direct entry point into the message-wizard at a specific recipient-selection step. Items are role-filtered per profile.

interaction.note: Navigates to /message-wizard/{step} with selected send method pre-set

panels.name: scenarios
panels.purpose: Saved broadcast scenarios (templates). Each scenario is a pre-configured message setup. Clicking starts the wizard pre-filled with the scenario's recipient and message data.

interaction.note: Pre-fills wizard state from selected scenario

panels.name: quick-send
panels.purpose: Send a single SMS or email directly without entering the full wizard. Tab-switched between SMS and Email channels.

interaction.note: Submit sends immediately. No navigation. Success reloads sent-messages panel.

data_behavior.note: Each group loaded independently. Interval duration UNKNOWN.

groups.name: sent
groups.purpose: Show most recently dispatched broadcasts. Read-only overview. Clicking an item allows user to review full delivery status.

groups.name: planned
groups.purpose: Show scheduled broadcasts not yet sent. Allows deletion before dispatch.

groups.name: unapproved
groups.purpose: Show messages waiting for approver sign-off. Inline approve/reject without leaving the hub.
groups.condition: user is SmsGroupApprover for current profile

interaction.note: Approval/rejection updates item state. Item moves out of this group on action.

groups.name: unfinished
groups.purpose: Show draft messages started but not submitted. Allows cleanup or resumption.

panels.name: send-methods
panels.purpose: Role-filtered broadcast method icon-grid. Core MVP entry point.

panels.name: sent-messages
panels.purpose: Latest sent broadcasts — visibility into recent activity.

panels.name: planned-messages
panels.purpose: Upcoming scheduled broadcasts with delete action.

unknowns: status-list item count: how many items shown per panel (last 5? 10? configurable?)
unfinished-messages: clicking an item — does it resume wizard at last step, or restart at recipient-selection?
broadcasting-limited variant: /broadcasting-limited — same hub with fewer panels, or entirely different component?
quick-send on success: does the sent-messages panel refresh automatically (SSE/polling), or only on manual reload?
unapproved-messages after action: does item animate out immediately (optimistic UI), or waits for server confirmation?
messages panel (status-list groups): are groups loaded in a single API call (all statuses) or one request per group?
interval refresh: what is the polling interval for dynamic status-list groups?
